twitter.copy: Stay hydrated with safe, pure & healthy drinking water from Bisleri! 50+ years of trust, 130+ plants & a robust distribution network. #Bisleri #QualityMatters #StayHydrated

instagram.copy: At Demo Brand, we believe in quality & service. That's why we trust Bisleri, a symbol of trust, purity & reliability in India for decades. With 130+ operational plants & a robust distribution network, Bisleri delivers safe, pure & healthy drinking water. Join the movement towards a healthier you! #Bisleri #DemoBrand #QualityAndService #HealthyDrinkingWater
instagram.call_to_action: Make the switch to Bisleri today!
